file:compare.name: file:compare
file:compare.description: Compares a local file with the version currently deployed in the File Cabinet of your account, showing a line-by-line diff.

path.name: path
path.description: Specifies the File Cabinet path of the file to compare. For example, "/SuiteScripts/file.js".

authid.name: authid
authid.description: References the custom alias you give to a specific account-role combination. Referred to as authentication ID and auth ID in the documentation.

account:setup.name: account:setup
account:setup.description: Sets up an account to use with SuiteCloud SDK and configures the default auth ID for the SuiteCloud project. This command requires browser-based login to NetSuite.

dev.name: dev
dev.description: It only needs to be specified if you want to use a customized NetSuite domain.
